selections.name: Get Her Number
selections.reason: Classy dropper with a 110 base speed and 97 class rating. Projects a perfect pressing trip behind the early speed duel, earning a pace bonus.

selections.name: Air Of Defiance
selections.reason: Strong early speed (109 base) with a solid 103 class rating. Will be contesting the pace but has the stamina to hold on for a share.

selections.name: Big Gain
selections.reason: Consistent presser with a 106 speed figure. Should benefit from a contested pace scenario and get first run at the leaders.

selections.name: Tiverton (gb)
selections.reason: Closer who will need a complete pace meltdown to win, but fits well underneath in exotics with a 103 speed rating.

danger_horse.name: Extravagant Prince
danger_horse.reason: Cheap speed that could hang around if the pace is unexpectedly slow, but class disparity cap limits his ceiling.

selections.name: Sanchoo
selections.reason: Wesley Ward first-time starter with Irad Ortiz Jr. aboard. Ward's 26% win rate with 2yos makes this the clear top choice.

selections.name: Express Success
selections.reason: Asmussen trainee drawing outside. Jose Ortiz takes the mount, indicating strong intent for this debut.

selections.name: Sharpie Girl
selections.reason: Showing solid morning workouts. Danner and Beschizza team up for a sneaky debut run.

selections.name: Baytown Sassy
selections.reason: Experience edge is non-existent here, but has shown enough in the mornings to hit the board.

danger_horse.name: Lumberjill
danger_horse.reason: Could surprise if the top choices fail to fire out of the gate.

selections.name: Right Now
selections.reason: Top speed figure (109) in the field. Should dictate the pace and is the controlling speed with a class rating of 101.

selections.name: Don't Say It
selections.reason: Classy presser (108 class rating) who will sit right off the pace. Brad Cox trainee gets a positive pace setup.

selections.name: Commanded
selections.reason: Consistent 103 speed figure and 104 class. Should get a good stalking trip behind the leaders.

selections.name: Protomagic
selections.reason: Veteran mare who can show early speed. Might get caught in a duel but has the class to hold on for a minor award.

danger_horse.name: Socialbutterflytam
danger_horse.reason: Has back class and could pick up the pieces if the pace collapses.

selections.name: Operation Overlord
selections.reason: Pletcher and Irad Ortiz team up. Boasts a 116 speed figure and 109 class rating. Looks primed for a top effort.

selections.name: Relative Value (gb)
selections.reason: Chad Brown trainee with Flavien Prat. 111 speed and 113 class. Will be flying late in the stretch.

selections.name: Lazlo
selections.reason: Consistent turf router with a 115 speed figure. Joel Rosario takes the mount, adding to the appeal.

selections.name: My Boy Tony
selections.reason: Inside draw is a slight advantage. 115 speed figure makes him a major player underneath.

danger_horse.name: Hall Monitor
danger_horse.reason: Capable of outrunning his odds if he gets a clean trip mid-pack.

selections.name: Editor
selections.reason: Drops into maiden claiming company. 109 speed figure towers over this field. Irad Ortiz Jr. rides.

selections.name: Rare Eclipse
selections.reason: Solid 104 speed figure and 93 class. Should be forwardly placed and is the main threat to the favorite.

selections.name: Nanosecond
selections.reason: Pletcher trainee with Prat aboard. 101 speed figure suggests he is improving and fits well here.

selections.name: Props
selections.reason: Gets class relief and has a 96 speed figure. Can hit the board at a price.

danger_horse.name: Big Boy Thunder
danger_horse.reason: Has shown flashes of ability and could wake up in this lower class level.

selections.name: Me Governor
selections.reason: Huge 117 speed figure and 109 class. Drawn well inside and should get a perfect stalking trip.

selections.name: Lovely Emma
selections.reason: 115 speed figure and draws the rail. Jose Ortiz will have her forwardly placed.

selections.name: Pandora's Gift (ire)
selections.reason: Classy European import with a 114 speed figure. Flavien Prat rides for Clement.

selections.name: Big Trouble
selections.reason: Consistent performer with a 112 speed figure. Irad Ortiz Jr. takes the mount.

danger_horse.name: She's A Tempest
danger_horse.reason: Has the late kick to hit the board if the pace is hot.

selections.name: Shotgun Wedding
selections.reason: 113 speed and 113 class. Draws the rail and has the early speed to control the race.

selections.name: Evanescence
selections.reason: High class rating (117) and solid 108 speed. Will be closing late and is a major threat.

selections.name: Lynn's Milky Way
selections.reason: 107 speed and 108 class. Consistent performer who should get a good trip.

selections.name: Roswell
selections.reason: 106 speed and class. Can hit the board with a clean trip.

danger_horse.name: Beyond Belief
danger_horse.reason: Capable of outrunning her odds if she gets a fast pace to close into.

selections.name: Bull Shoals
selections.reason: Top speed figure in the field (119) and highest class (117). Should overcome the outside draw.

selections.name: Gold Sovereign
selections.reason: Chad Brown and Flavien Prat team up. 118 speed and 108 class makes him a prime contender.

selections.name: Protect And Defend
selections.reason: 117 speed figure and 102 class. Should be forwardly placed and has a strong chance.

selections.name: Mortal Lock
selections.reason: 111 speed and 103 class. Consistent closer who can hit the superfecta.

danger_horse.name: Astar
danger_horse.reason: Draws the rail and has a 110 speed figure. Could save ground and sneak into the exotics.
